recommendations.title: The Remarkable Life of Ibelin
recommendations.overview: The secret life of a young World of Warcraft gamer is vividly reimagined when his online friends contact his family after his death.

recommendations.title: Whisper of the Heart
recommendations.overview: Shizuku lives a simple life, dominated by her love for stories and writing. One day she notices that all the library books she has have been previously checked out by the same person: "Seiji Amasawa."

recommendations.title: Boy & the World
recommendations.overview: Suffering because of his father's departure to the big city, a boy leaves his village and discovers a fantastic world dominated by bug-engines and strange beings. An unusual animation with various artistic techniques that portrays the issues of the m

recommendations.title: Barbie as the Island Princess
recommendations.overview: Young Rosella is saved by a few kind animals after a shipwreck. Now called Ro, she learns to talk to animals. One day, she saves the life of a prince and returns to civilisation to discover her past.

recommendations.title: The Long Weekend
recommendations.overview: Cooper is an actor who sees life as one big party, while Ed is in advertising and takes life too seriously. When Ed gets stressed over a deadline he has to meet, his brother Cooper works hard in trying to get his brother hooked up with a girl, thus a

recommendations.title: White Fang
recommendations.overview: A loyal wolfdog’s curiosity leads him on the adventure of a lifetime while serving a series of three distinctly different masters.

recommendations.title: Blue's Big City Adventure
recommendations.overview: When Josh gets the opportunity of a lifetime to audition for Rainbow Puppy’s Broadway musical, Josh and Blue skidoo to NYC for the very first time where they meet new friends and discover the magic of music, dance, and following one’s dreams.

recommendations.title: The Rain Children
recommendations.overview: There is a world with two towns that are big enemies: Pyross and Hydross.

recommendations.title: The Bad Guys
recommendations.overview: When the Bad Guys, a crew of criminal animals, are finally caught after years of heists and being the world’s most-wanted villains, Mr. Wolf brokers a deal to save them all from prison.

recommendations.title: Better Nate Than Ever
recommendations.overview: 13-year-old Nate Foster has big Broadway dreams but there’s only one problem — he can’t even land a part in the school play. When his parents leave town, Nate and his best friend Libby sneak off to the Big Apple for a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity t
